site_title: IAFS — Index of African Francophone Sovereignty
site_subtitle: 12 CFA-franc states, from independence to today.
axis_a_gloss: Distance from the colonial orbit (France) and the CFA franc.
axis_b_gloss: Power held by the political community rather than by an elite or an external patron. Not a democracy index.
baseline_gloss: The flag raised in 1960 does not measure substantive sovereignty. The gap is the thing to read.
coverage_gloss: Share of indicators with sourced data in that year.
dummy_banner: DUMMY DATA — no real country data is rendered. Schema v0.3.0.
footer_license: Data licensed CC-BY-4.0 · Code licensed MIT

hero.lede: 12 CFA-franc states. A sourced, anchored, revisable measure of their distance from the colonial orbit — from 1960 to today.

gap.title: The gap
gap.subtitle: 1960 → today
gap.caption: The flag raised in 1960 does not measure substantive sovereignty. The gap between independence on paper and real autonomy is what this index makes legible — year by year, event by event, source by source.

commitments.title: Three commitments
commitments.subtitle: What this index does — and what it refuses to do.

option1.title: Option 1 — France and the CFA, nothing else
option1.body: The index measures distance from the colonial orbit (France) and the CFA franc, and nothing else. It does not claim to be a global sovereignty ranking.

capture.title: Capture, not democracy
capture.body: Axis B measures capture — who decides, in practice — not distance from a Western democratic template. No Freedom House. No V-Dem.

anchor.title: Anchored, not relative
anchor.body: Every indicator is anchored to published, frozen thresholds. A country's score moves only when its own data moves — never because a neighbor changed.

miniviz.title: Feel the gap
miniviz.subtitle: A preview of the mechanism, on two placeholder countries. No real data shown.

audit.title: Auditable, open, forkable
audit.subtitle: Data under CC-BY-4.0, code under MIT. The repository is the source of truth.
audit.no_fabrication: Every datapoint carries a resolvable source and a publication date. No fabrication. No interpolation.
